rationale: The citing paper’s core question is how effort shifts preferences between luxury (hedonic) and necessity (utilitarian) rewards, and its note explicitly says it “extends prior work on hedonic versus utilitarian choice.” The cited paper is a direct prior contribution on hedonic-versus-utilitarian choice mechanisms (acquisition vs. forfeiture framing), making it a plausible theoretical foundation rather than a generic mention.
